headline: Alphabet, Unum Group, JM Smucker And More: CNBC’s ‘Final Trades’
summary: Unum Group gained 2.2% to close at $91.40 on Wednesday, while Alphabet shares gained 1.1% to close at $361.21 on Wednesday.
